jurisdiction.adopting_body: U.S. Access Board / GSA / DoD / USPS / HUD

rules.label: General Exceptions / Scoping
rules.notes_template: Verify ABA scoping for federal facilities: leased, designed, constructed, or altered with federal funds — full ABA Standards apply with limited exceptions in §203.
rules.citation: ABA §203 – General exceptions for raised areas, limited-access spaces, machinery spaces, single-occupant structures, residential dwellings (per §233), and others.
rules.remediation: Document any §203 exceptions claimed; otherwise apply ABA technical chapters 3–10.

rules.label: Accessible Routes
rules.notes_template: Verify accessible routes connect site arrival points, accessible parking, the accessible entrance, all accessible spaces, and elements within those spaces.
rules.remediation: Plan a continuous accessible route per §206; coordinate with §402 technical.

rules.label: Signs
rules.notes_template: Verify tactile signs at permanent room IDs and visual signs sized for viewing distance per §703 (parallel to ADA).
rules.citation: ABA §216 / §703 – Sign scoping and technical (mirrors ADA §216/§703).

rules.label: Transient Lodging Guest Rooms
rules.notes_template: Verify the §224 ratio of accessible guest rooms; each accessible guest room shall comply with §806 (mobility features, communication features).
rules.citation: ABA §224 / §806 – Transient lodging accessible guest room scoping and technical.
rules.remediation: Build a guest-room schedule per §224; detail accessible rooms per §806.
